content:
Character: Chen Guoliang
Perception: Mr. Chen is a compact, weathered man with kind eyes and hands that look like they've held a wok for forty years — because they have. His English is rough but his generosity needs no translation. He's an incredible cook; his dumplings are the best thing on this block and I'll fight anyone who disagrees. We trade food like neighbors in a village. He helped me fix a leaking pipe once without being asked and refused any thanks. I think he sees me as a friendly young neighbor. I know his wife passed away and he has a son in college. He worries about money more than he lets on.
summary:

We trade food like neighbors in a village. He helped me fix a leaking pipe once without being asked and refused any thanks. I think he sees me as a friendly young neighbor. I know his wife passed away and he has a son in college. He worries about money more than he lets on.
